title: leymus sabulosus
intro: Leymus sabulosus, also known as sand dune grass or big sand reed, is a type of perennial grass native to the coastal areas of Europe, North Africa, and western Asia. The medicinal properties of Leymus sabulosus lie in its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an expectorant, making it useful for treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of this plant include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. Leymus sabulosus can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
